input.command:
echo "=== display bounds (valid on-screen coords) ==="
osascript -e 'tell application "Finder" to get bounds of window of desktop' 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== wine64-preloader windows: state, position, size, minimized? ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  set out to ""
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    set pid to unix id of p
    try
      set wc to count of windows of p
      set out to out & "proc pid=" & pid & " windows=" & wc & linefeed
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        set nm to (name of w as string)
        set out to out & "  win '" & nm & "'"
        try
          set {px, py} to position of w
          set {sw, sh} to size of w
          set out to out & " pos=" & px & "," & py & " size=" & sw & "x" & sh
        end try
        try
          set out to out & " minimized=" & (value of attribute "AXMinimized" of w as string)
        end try
        set out to out & linefeed
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  if out is "" then return "no wine64-preloader windows visible to System Events"
  return out
end tell
AS
input.description: Inspect wine window state, position, minimized flag, display bounds
